name: Iso11783IL_TIMSaveLwATable
title: Iso11783IL_TIMSaveLwATable
description: Stores the table with lightweight authentication (LwA) keys in a file.
You can load the stored LwA table with function Iso11783IL_TIMLoadLwATable.

parameters.name: iniFilePath
parameters.description: Path of a file (INI file format) which stores the LwA key table of the TIM client/server. path has to be absolute or relative relating to the folder of the CANoe configuration.
